purpose: A tabular display of data with columns, rows, and optional selection. Supports sorting, filtering, multi-select, and inline actions.
whenToUse: For structured data with multiple aligned columns
When users need to compare items across attributes
whenNotToUse: For fewer than 3 rows — use List
For complex hierarchical data — use Tree or TreeTable
doRules: Use a clear title in the Table Toolbar
Provide column headers with sort/filter affordances
Use MultiSelect mode when bulk actions exist
dontRules: Do not put primary actions inside cells — use row click or toolbar
Do not use Table for fewer than 3 rows — use List
Do not stack tables — provide tabs or filters

contentGuidance.labelLength: Cell content varies by column type.
contentRules: Use ObjectIdentifier for primary cell content

responsiveBehavior.L: All columns visible; minor columns may collapse
responsiveBehavior.M: Pop-in behavior — secondary columns move below primary cell

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Arrow keys navigate cells; Enter activates row action
Table has caption or aria-label; each column has header
